meta.title: Qafila - the letter of credit, without the bank

hero.title: The letter of credit, without the bank.
hero.subtitle: Lock stablecoin in escrow on Polygon. Your supplier is paid the moment shipment is proven.

features.kicker: Held in trust, released on proof
features.title: Fast. Safe. On-chain.
features.subtitle: Qafila leans on Polygon so payment clears in seconds, not a ten-day review cycle.
features.secureBody: Funds sit in an audited smart contract, never in a middleman's account.
features.trustBody: Your capital is safekept and released only when the agreed condition is met.
features.releaseBody: A matching shipping-document hash releases payment to your supplier automatically.

how.title: How it works
how.subtitle: Three moves from stranger to settled trade.
how.step1Body: The importer locks stablecoin in the contract. Held in trust, not sent.
how.step2Body: The exporter submits the agreed shipping document. Its hash is checked on-chain.
how.step3Body: On proof, the escrow pays the exporter automatically. The light passes.

problems.title: The old way loses deals.
problems.feesBody: Traditional trade finance is expensive and stacked with intermediaries.
problems.slowBody: Letters of credit crawl through manual review while goods sit idle.
problems.rejectBody: A mismatch like 'steel tubes' versus 'steel pipes' can sink the whole deal.

finalCta.title: Trade with a supplier you don't know yet.
finalCta.subtitle: Open an escrow in a minute. Screen the counterparty, fund, and settle on proof.

footer.tagline: The letter of credit, without the bank.
footer.rights: Qafila. Testnet demo. All rights reserved.

dashboard.title: Trade escrows
dashboard.subtitle: Your funds are held in trust and released only on proof.
dashboard.empty: No escrows yet. Create one to begin.
dashboard.connectFirst: Connect your wallet to view escrows.
dashboard.notDeployed: Contracts are not deployed yet. Run the deploy script and set the addresses.

create.title: New trade escrow
create.modeHashHelp: Instant, tamper-proof release the moment the agreed file is submitted. It proves the exporter holds the agreed document, not that goods physically shipped.
create.modeConfirmHelp: You release the funds manually once you are satisfied the goods shipped. Slower, but your own judgment is the check.
create.stablecoinMock: AEDx is a mock dirham-pegged token with a one-click faucet for the demo.
create.stablecoinReal: Circle's real USDC on Polygon Amoy. Get test USDC from the Circle faucet.
